  • Overview
  • Tree
  • Index
  • Search
  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    Archer
    Represents an Archer piece in the Kuroshiro engine.
    ArcherTest
    Unit tests for the Archer piece.
    Archmage
    Represents an Archmage piece within the Kuroshiro engine.
    ArchmageTest
    Unit tests for the Archmage piece.
    Assassin
    Represents an Assassin piece within the Kuroshiro engine.
    AssassinTest
    Unit tests for the Assassin piece.
    Board
    Represents the 8x8 game board for the Kuroshiro engine.
    ChessApp
    The primary graphical user interface for the Kuroshiro game.
    Color
    Represents the affiliation of a game piece or a player within the Kuroshiro engine.
    Dragon
    Represents a highly powerful Dragon piece within the Kuroshiro engine.
    DragonTest
    Unit tests for the Dragon piece.
    GameEngine
    The core engine of the Kuroshiro game, responsible for managing the central game state.
    GameEngineTest
    Unit tests for the GameEngine mechanics and win conditions.
    GameSetup
    A utility class responsible for initializing the Kuroshiro game board.
    GameSetupTest
    Unit tests for the GameSetup utility.
    Mage
    Represents a Mage piece within the Kuroshiro engine.
    MageTest
    Unit tests for the Mage piece.
    Main
    The primary entry point for the Kuroshiro application.
    Moveable
    Defines the contract for any entity capable of movement within the Kuroshiro game engine.
    MoveResult
    Encapsulates the complete outcome of an attempted action (move, shoot, or stab) within the Kuroshiro game engine.
    MoveResult.Status
    Represents the specific state or error code resulting from an action attempt.
    Piece
    The abstract foundation for all game pieces within the Kuroshiro engine.
    Position
    Represents a specific spatial coordinate on the 8x8 Kuroshiro game board.
    PositionTest
    Unit tests for the Position data class.
    Shootable
    Defines the contract for any piece capable of executing ranged attacks within the Kuroshiro engine.
    Stabbable
    Defines the contract for any piece capable of executing close-range melee attacks within the Kuroshiro engine.
    Warrior
    Represents a Warrior piece within the Kuroshiro engine.
    WarriorTest
    Unit tests for the Warrior piece.
